1.gl: to exist, i.e. be or become, come to pass (always emphatic, and not a mere copula or auxiliary)
1.kj: beacon, [idiom] altogether, be(-come), accomplished, committed, like), break, cause, come (to pass), do, faint, fall, [phrase] follow, happen, [idiom] have, last, pertain, quit (on

1.gl: a pasture (i.e. open field, whither cattle are driven); by implication, a desert; also speech (including its organs)
1.dv: from H1696 (דָבַר) in the sense of driving;

1.gl: Jehudah (or Judah), the name of five Israelites; also of the tribe descended from the first, and of its territory
David, the youngest son of Jesse
1.dv: rarely (fully); דָּוִיד; from the same as H1730 (דּוֹד); loving;

1.gl: properly, instrumental music; by implication, a poem set to notes

2.gl: properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental)
2.kj: any, appetite, beast, body, breath, creature, [idiom] dead(-ly), desire, [idiom] (dis-) contented, [idiom] fish, ghost, [phrase] greedy, he, heart(-y), (hath, [idiom] jeopardy of)

2.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
2.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

2.gl: thou and thee, or (plural) ye and you
2.dv: or (shortened); אַתָּ; or אַת; feminine (irregular) sometimes אַתִּי; plural masculine אַתֶּם; feminine אַתֶּן; or אַתֵּנָהlemma אתֵּנָה missing vowel

2.gl: properly, to dawn, i.e. (figuratively) be (up) early at any task (with the implication of earnestness); by extension, to search for (with painstaking)
2.kj: (do something) betimes, enquire early, rise (seek) betimes, seek diligently) early, in the morning).

2.gl: properly, failure, i.e. nothing or destruction; usually (with preposition) without, not yet, because not, as long as, etc.
2.kj: corruption, ig(norantly), for lack of, where no...is, so that no, none, not, un(awares), without.

2.gl: strength; as adjective, mighty; especially the Almighty (but used also of any deity)
2.kj: God (god), [idiom] goodly, [idiom] great, idol, might(-y one), power, strong. Compare names in '-el.'

3.gl: to see, literally or figuratively (in numerous applications, direct and implied, transitive, intransitive and causative)
3.kj: advise self, appear, approve, behold, [idiom] certainly, consider, discern, (make to) enjoy, have experience, gaze, take heed, [idiom] indeed, [idiom] joyfully, lo, look (on, one a

3.gl: a sacred place or thing; rarely abstract, sanctity
3.kj: consecrated (thing), dedicated (thing), hallowed (thing), holiness, ([idiom] most) holy ([idiom] day, portion, thing), saint, sanctuary.

3.gl: properly, weight, but only figuratively in a good sense, splendor or copiousness
strength in various applications (force, security, majesty, praise)
3.kj: boldness, loud, might, power, strength, strong.

3.gl: to gaze at; mentally to perceive, contemplate (with pleasure); specifically, to have avision of

4.gl: good (as an adjective) in the widest sense; used likewise as a noun, both in the masculine and the feminine, the singular and the plural (good, a good or good thing, a good man or woman; the good, goods or good things, g
4.kj: beautiful, best, better, bountiful, cheerful, at ease, [idiom] fair (word), (be in) favour, fine, glad, good (deed, -lier, -liest, -ly, -ness, -s), graciously, joyful, kindly, kind

4.gl: alive; hence, raw (flesh); fresh (plant, water, year), strong; also (as noun, especially in the feminine singular and masculine plural) life (or living thing), whether literally or figuratively
4.kj: [phrase] age, alive, appetite, (wild) beast, company, congregation, life(-time), live(-ly), living (creature, thing), maintenance, [phrase] merry, multitude, [phrase] (be) old, qui

4.gl: the lip (as a natural boundary); by implication, language; by analogy, a margin (of a vessel, water, cloth, etc.)
4.kj: band, bank, binding, border, brim, brink, edge, language, lip, prating, (sea-)shore, side, speech, talk, (vain) words.
4.dv: or (in dual and plural) שֶׂפֶת; probably from H5595 (סָפָה) or H8192 (שָׁפָה) through the idea of termination (compare H5490 (סוֹף));

4.gl: kindness; by implication (towards God) piety; rarely (by opposition) reproof, or (subject.) beauty
4.kj: favour, good deed(-liness, -ness), kindly, (loving-) kindness, merciful (kindness), mercy, pity, reproach, wicked thing.

4.gl: properly, to address in aloud tone, i.e. (specifically) loud; figuratively, to pacify (as if by words)
4.kj: commend, glory, keep in, praise, still, triumph.

5.gl: to lift, in a great variety of applications, literal and figurative, absolute and relative
5.kj: accept, advance, arise, (able to, (armor), suffer to) bear(-er, up), bring (forth), burn, carry (away), cast, contain, desire, ease, exact, exalt (self), extol, fetch, forgive, fur

5.gl: alive; hence, raw (flesh); fresh (plant, water, year), strong; also (as noun, especially in the feminine singular and masculine plural) life (or living thing), whether literally or figuratively
5.kj: [phrase] age, alive, appetite, (wild) beast, company, congregation, life(-time), live(-ly), living (creature, thing), maintenance, [phrase] merry, multitude, [phrase] (be) old, qui

5.gl: to kneel; by implication to bless God (as an act of adoration), and (vice-versa) man (as a benefit); also (by euphemism) to curse (God or the king, as treason)
5.kj: [idiom] abundantly, [idiom] altogether, [idiom] at all, blaspheme, bless, congratulate, curse, [idiom] greatly, [idiom] indeed, kneel (down), praise, salute, [idiom] still, thank.

5.gl: the hollow hand or palm (so of the paw of an animal, of the sole, and even of the bowl of a dish or sling, the handle of a bolt, the leaves of a palm-tree); figuratively, power
5.kj: branch, [phrase] foot, hand((-ful), -dle, (-led)), hollow, middle, palm, paw, power, sole, spoon.

5.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
5.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

6.gl: properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental)
6.kj: any, appetite, beast, body, breath, creature, [idiom] dead(-ly), desire, [idiom] (dis-) contented, [idiom] fish, ghost, [phrase] greedy, he, heart(-y), (hath, [idiom] jeopardy of)

6.gl: the mouth (as the means of blowing), whether literal or figurative (particularly speech); specifically edge, portion or side; adverbially (with preposition) according to
6.kj: accord(-ing as, -ing to), after, appointment, assent, collar, command(-ment), [idiom] eat, edge, end, entry, [phrase] file, hole, [idiom] in, mind, mouth, part, portion, [idiom] (s

6.gl: to be clear (orig. of sound, but usually of color); to shine; hence, to make ashow, to boast; and thus to be (clamorously) foolish; to rave; causatively, to celebrate; also to stultify
6.kj: (make) boast (self), celebrate, commend, (deal, make), fool(-ish, -ly), glory, give (light), be (make, feign self) mad (against), give in marriage, (sing, be worthy of) praise, rag

6.gl: the lip (as a natural boundary); by implication, language; by analogy, a margin (of a vessel, water, cloth, etc.)
6.kj: band, bank, binding, border, brim, brink, edge, language, lip, prating, (sea-)shore, side, speech, talk, (vain) words.
6.dv: or (in dual and plural) שֶׂפֶת; probably from H5595 (סָפָה) or H8192 (שָׁפָה) through the idea of termination (compare H5490 (סוֹף));

6.gl: to sate, i.e. fill to satisfaction (literally or figuratively)
6.kj: have enough, fill (full, self, with), be (to the) full (of), have plenty of, be satiate, satisfy (with), suffice, be weary of.

6.gl: fat, whether literally or figuratively; hence, the richest or choice part
6.dv: or חֵלֶב; from an unused root meaning to be fat;

7.gl: properly, to mark (so as to be recognized), i.e. to remember; by implication, to mention;  to be male
7.kj: [idiom] burn (incense), [idiom] earnestly, be male, (make) mention (of), be mindful, recount, record(-er), remember, make to be remembered, bring (call, come, keep, put) to (in) re
7.dv: a primitive root; also as denominative from H2145 (זָכָר)

7.gl: to murmur (in pleasure or anger); by implication, to ponder
7.kj: imagine, meditate, mourn, mutter, roar, [idiom] sore, speak, study, talk, utter.

7.gl: spread, i.e. a bed; (architecture) an extension, i.e. wing or lean-to (a single story or collectively)

7.dv: or אַשׁמוּרָה; or אַשׁמֹרֶת; (feminine) from H8104 (שָׁמַר);

8.gl: to exist, i.e. be or become, come to pass (always emphatic, and not a mere copula or auxiliary)

8.gl: an edge or extremity; specifically (of a bird or army) a wing, (of a garment or bedclothing) a flap, (of the earth) a quarter, (of a building) a pinnacle
8.kj: [phrase] bird, border, corner, end, feather(-ed), [idiom] flying, [phrase] (one an-) other, overspreading, [idiom] quarters, skirt, [idiom] sort, uttermost part, wing(-ed).

8.gl: properly, to creak (or emit a stridulous sound), i.e. to shout (usually for joy)
8.kj: aloud for joy, cry out, be joyful (greatly, make to) rejoice, (cause to) shout (for joy), (cause to) sing (aloud, for joy, out), triumph.

8.dv: or עֶזְרָת; (Psalm 60:11 (13); Psalm 108:12 (13)), feminine of H5828 (עֵזֶר);

9.gl: properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental)
9.kj: any, appetite, beast, body, breath, creature, [idiom] dead(-ly), desire, [idiom] (dis-) contented, [idiom] fish, ghost, [phrase] greedy, he, heart(-y), (hath, [idiom] jeopardy of)

9.gl: properly, the hind part; generally used as an adverb or conjunction, after (in various senses)
9.kj: after (that, -ward), again, at, away from, back (from, -side), behind, beside, by, follow (after, -ing), forasmuch, from, hereafter, hinder end, [phrase] out (over) live, [phrase]

9.gl: properly, to impinge, i.e. cling or adhere; figuratively, to catch by pursuit
9.kj: abide fast, cleave (fast together), follow close (hard after), be joined (together), keep (fast), overtake, pursue hard, stick, take.

9.gl: the right hand or side (leg, eye) of a person or other object (as the stronger and more dexterous); locally, the south
to sustain; by implication, to obtain, keep fast; figuratively, to help, follow close

10.gl: properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental)
10.kj: any, appetite, beast, body, breath, creature, [idiom] dead(-ly), desire, [idiom] (dis-) contented, [idiom] fish, ghost, [phrase] greedy, he, heart(-y), (hath, [idiom] jeopardy of)

10.gl: to search out (by any method, specifically in worship or prayer); by implication, to strive after
10.kj: ask, beg, beseech, desire, enquire, get, make inquisition, procure, (make) request, require, seek (for).

10.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
10.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
10.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;
or (feminine) שׁוֹאָה; or שֹׁאָה; from an unused root meaning to rush over;

10.gl: lowermost; as noun (feminine plural) the depths (figuratively, a pit, the womb)

11.gl: to flow; figuratively, to stretch out; causatively, to pour out or down; figuratively, to deliver over
11.kj: fall, flow away, pour down (out), run, shed, spilt, trickle down.

11.gl: drought; also a cutting instrument (from its destructive effect), as a knife, sword, or other sharp implement
11.kj: axe, dagger, knife, mattock, sword, tool.

11.gl: an allotment (by courtesy, law or providence)

11.dv: or שֻׁעָל; from the same as H8168 (שֹׁעַל);
